notes: Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V Baud Rate: 57600 (match rigctrl.baud)
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V Address: A2 (default)
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V USB Echo Back: ON
Menu > Set > Connectors > USB (B) Function: Enable
Menu > Set > Connectors > DATA MOD: USB
Digirig connects to CI-V jack (3.5mm) for CAT/PTT and DATA jack for audio
Menu > Set > Connectors > DATA MOD: ACC (for audio from DATA jack)
Menu > Set > Connectors > ACC Send Output: 144 ON, 430 ON
PTT is controlled via RTS on the Digirig serial port
PTT Via COM port using RTS (not CAT commands)
Wine COM5 must be symlinked to /dev/ttyUSB0 (Digirig)
If using USB cable directly, PTT can use CAT instead of RTS
